'''Q-E''' was a [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Model E baby-sitting droid|Model E]], a [[Nanny droid/Legends|nanny droid]] who ran a nursery on [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]] along with his companions [[2-E]] and [[U-E]].

==Biography==
At some point prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they were ordered by a townsman named [[Vuldo]] to build illegal [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], but the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] questioned his intentions. Vuldo responded by shooting U-E with a blaster.

Q-E and 2-E then received help from [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[Nak Pitareeze]] and managed to expose Vuldo's scheme, and also save U-E since they had managed to salvage his [[Cogitative Theory Unit|cogitative theory unit]] and [[Memory bank/Legends|memory banks]] beforehand and thus, R2-D2 was able to install them on the body of a [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] that had been constructed by Nak.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1994) 5|''Droids'' (1994) 5]] {{1st}}
